title: glochidion glabrum
intro: Glochidion glabrum, also known as the smooth leafed Glochidion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glochidion glabrum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Glochidion glabrum often involve making tea from its leaves or using it in ointments and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
